name: Coconut Snowballs
recipeIngredient: 3 cups sweetened coconut flakes, lightly packed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees F.
2. Coat 2 baking sheets with cooking spray.
3. Beat egg whites in a bowl until stiff peaks form but not dry.
4. Gradually beat in salt, sugar, vanilla extract, and flour into the egg whites.
5. Stir in coconut flakes.
6. Drop batter by rounded teaspoonfuls about 1-inch apart onto prepared baking sheets.
7. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes or until lightly browned.
8. Allow cookies to cool briefly on baking sheets, then transfer to wire racks to cool completely.
